archetype.name: Archer
archetype.note: This archetype offers Double Shot at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Double Shot
feat.requirement: You are wielding a ranged weapon with reload 0
feat.text: You shoot twice in blindingly fast succession. Make two Strikes, each against a separate target and with a –2 penalty. Both attacks count toward your multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn’t increase until after you’ve made both of them.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

traits.name: Flourish
traits.text: Actions with the flourish trait are special techniques that require too much exertion for you to perform frequently. You can use only one action with the flourish trait per round.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
